channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: External building lights at Well Street not on at 9:45pm, 23rd May
item.description:
Lights in stairwells are on, light for external walkways on building ALL off. All other buildings have lights on. PLEASE FIX THIS! THE LIGHTS IN THIS BUILDING NEVER WORK!!!!!!
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Well Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Branches sticking out on footpath and school children have to go on a road to avoid it. It’s very dangerous, 23rd May
item.description:
It’s been the for ages please act asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Iron Mill Lane, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping at the bin by the bus stop, 23rd May
item.description:
The rubbish is baby nappies now strewn over the pavement by the bus stop.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warepoint Drive, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner of Oppidans and Primrose Hill Rd, 23rd May
item.description:
Defective metal chamber cover at the corner of Oppidans Road and Primrose Hill Road, NW3. Cover is partially displaced, unstable and flexes significantly under load. It is not properly supported within its frame and appears at risk of collapse. Serious pedestrian safety hazard. Urgent inspection and replacement required.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oppidans Road, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on street, 23rd May
item.description:
Large fly tip and there are multiple all the way down the road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oulton Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Broken glasses
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Haydon Street, City of London

item.category: Damage - smashed glass or panels / jagged metal edges on shelter

item.title: Abandoned vehicle d, 23rd May
item.description:
Causing an obstruction

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Saunders Road, Plumstead

item.title: Metal bin required inside outer casing, 23rd May
item.description:
There is no metal bin with a black bag inside which means people at the bus stop throwing rubbish on the floor. Please provide a metal bin inside the green outer casing. This will dramatically reduce the litter here as it's right at the bus stop

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Brondesbury Villas- The Mallard Close Gates, 23rd May
item.description:
Soiled mattresses discarded at the gates of Mallard Close.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London

item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Rubber speed bump keeps coming apart, 23rd May
item.description:
Rubber speed bump keeps coming apart exposing metal brackets underneath. I have put it back in place twice so far.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Merbury Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped rubbish, 23rd May
item.description:
Appears to be carpet or turf dumped on the green.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elmbrook Gardens, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Access issues, 23rd May
item.description:
With Thames Water closing Longmead Drive, all the traffic in the area is forced to use Maylands Drive, including buses. As no parking restrictions have been put in place, this has created a dangerous bottleneck with traffic only being able to use a single lane. This is causing chaos to the area as cars are parked blocking access or even allowing passing points. Why have parking restrictions not been put into place to ensure the safe passage of travel. In the near future, this will get worse when the end of Longmead Drive is closed. This shows a serious lack of planning in the part of Bexley and Thames Water
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 70, Maylands Drive, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian area on Hazelmere Road before Glengall Road, 23rd May
item.description:
Fly tipping and Rubbish everywhere

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hazelmere Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Rubbish piles 6 months no removal rodents, 23rd May

item.title: Lancaster Avenue SE27 by Thurlow Park Road junction, 23rd May
item.description:
Lancaster Avenue SE27 by Thurlow Park Road junction / side of Rosemead School are a number of cycle parking hoops. Two cycle frames dumped chained to hoops. Picture attached. Google Steetview: https://www.google.com/maps/@51.4392089,-0.0981362,3a,75y,300.6h,79.21t/data=!3m7!1e1!3m5!1sgrJdiaSG1g5oabcqSfy9vg!2e0!6shttps:%2F%2Fstreetviewpixels-pa.googleapis.com%2Fv1%2Fthumbnail%3Fcb_client%3Dmaps_sv.tactile%26w%3D900%26h%3D600%26pitch%3D10.794733997486887%26panoid%3DgrJdiaSG1g5oabcqSfy9vg%26yaw%3D300.6023873262551!7i16384!8i8192?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDUyMC4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 84, Lancaster Avenue, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
